title: Tao Te Ching 57
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 57 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 57 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: Govern the state with correctness. Wage war with surprise tactics. Win the world by doing nothing.
